title: How would I create a appointment calendar for my soccer club?
excerpt: How would I create an appointment calendar for my soccer club?  We have many teams and many practice fields and those fields required maintenance where no one can be on them.  I need a calendar that allows me to schedule…

posts.author: Texastros (Jeffrey N Madden)
posts.cookedHtml: How would I create an appointment calendar for my soccer club? We have many teams and many practice fields and those fields required maintenance where no one can be on them. I need a calendar that allows me to schedule teams practice times/fields with scheduled off times for maintenance. Plus I need to share this appointment calendar with coaches and maintenance crews. Any help would be appreciated.

posts.author: KDrevies (KDrevies)
posts.cookedHtml: I know this thread is a bit old, but I’m wondering if you ever tried using one board for fields and another for team bookings, then connecting them. You can block off maintenance time by creating items with a “status = unavailable” and letting automations stop coaches from picking those slots. If you’re still working on this, how are you handling last‑minute changes?

posts.author: KDrevies (KDrevies)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been keeping track of matches on my phone, and using RubiScore live results & stats has made it way easier to follow everything without jumping between apps. I like that I can just follow my teams and get the goal and card alerts instantly. If you want quick updates without any fuss, it’s been a solid option for me.
